sessionStart.bash: sh -c '[ -f .github/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh ] && bash .github/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh copilot session-start || bash "$HOME/.copilot/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh" copilot session-start'

preToolUse.bash: sh -c '[ -f .github/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh ] && bash .github/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh copilot pre-tool-use || bash "$HOME/.copilot/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh" copilot pre-tool-use'

postToolUse.bash: sh -c '[ -f .github/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh ] && bash .github/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh copilot post-tool-use || bash "$HOME/.copilot/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh" copilot post-tool-use'

agentStop.bash: sh -c '[ -f .github/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh ] && bash .github/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh copilot agent-stop || bash "$HOME/.copilot/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh" copilot agent-stop'

errorOccurred.bash: sh -c '[ -f .github/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh ] && bash .github/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh copilot error-occurred || bash "$HOME/.copilot/hooks/task-scoped-hook.sh" copilot error-occurred'
